S.FORM: Richard Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1960, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Richard Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Richard Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1960, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Richard Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: riʦ~ʨħar* an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, riʦ~ʨħar* an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
